layout.earlyAccess: Now in early access — free while we build
layout.subheadline: Goals, habits, deep work, and analytics — one coherent system so progress becomes inevitable.
layout.featureGoals: Hierarchical goals that break big dreams into daily action
layout.featurePlanner: A daily planner with a live focus timer and habit streaks
layout.featureHabits: Momentum-building habits that compound over time
layout.featureAnalytics: Analytics that show exactly where your time goes
layout.footer: No credit card required · Cancel anytime

signin.title: Welcome back
signin.subtitle: Sign in to your Fulcrum account
signin.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
signin.errorSignInFailed: Sign in failed. Please try again.
signin.errorUnexpected: Unexpected response from server. Please try again.
signin.errorConnection: Could not connect to the server. Please try again.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Free while we build — no credit card required.
signup.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
signup.errorConnection: Could not complete signup. Please check your connection and try again.
signup.defaultSuccessMessage: Account created! Check your inbox for a verification code.

verifyEmail.title: Check your inbox
verifyEmail.descriptionWithEmail: We sent a verification code to <bold>{email}</bold>. Enter it below to activate your account.
verifyEmail.descriptionNoEmail: We sent a verification code to your email address. Enter it below to activate your account.
verifyEmail.resendSentMessage: ✓ A new code is on its way. Check your spam folder if you don't see it.
verifyEmail.toastMissingEmailDesc: Please go back to sign up and try again.
verifyEmail.toastResentDesc: A new code has been sent to {email}.
verifyEmail.toastCheckInboxDesc: If the address is registered a new code will arrive shortly.
verifyEmail.errorUnexpected: Unexpected response from server. Please try again.
verifyEmail.errorConnection: Could not verify your email. Please check your connection and try again.

oauthCallback.loadingMessage: Please wait while we finish authentication…
oauthCallback.loadingMessageSetup: Please wait while we set up your account…
oauthCallback.errorMissingCode: Missing authentication code. Please try again.
oauthCallback.errorMissingVerifier: Missing PKCE verifier. Please try again.
oauthCallback.errorDefault: Could not complete {provider} {action}. Please try again.
